description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior is predominantly white with large, black-framed windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front facade features a combination of a wide garage door, a standard entry door, and several windows arranged in a clean, geometric pattern. On one side, there is a protruding section with additional windows, likely serving as a small room or office. The rear of the house showcases expansive glass doors and windows, ideal for access to a backyard or patio. The overall structure is simple yet elegant, emphasizing functionality and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large black-framed windows, and a minimalist geometric design. Features include a garage, sliding glass doors, and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rear of the house with large sliding glass doors and windows, as well as a protruding side section with additional windows.
description_view_1: This side view shows a mostly solid white wall with minimal window openings, emphasizing the house's clean lines and geometric form.
description_view_2: The front view displays the garage door, main entry door, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows, giving a clear sense of the house's entryway and street-facing facade.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite side of the house, which is mostly solid with few window openings, maintaining the minimalist aesthetic.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door adjacent to a large garage door, with no porch or decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and minimalism.
